channel.title: Ibm on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Ibm on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: IBM Datastage manual
item.description: Status Name Status Code Explanation DSJS.RUNNING 0 Job is actually running DSJS.RUNOK 1 Job finished a normal run with no warnings DSJS.RUNWARN 2 Job finished a normal run with warnings DSJS.RUNFAILED 3 Job finished a normal run with a fatal error DSJS.QUEUED 4 Job queued waiting for resource allocation DSJS.VALOK 11 Job finished a validation run with no warnings DSJS.VALWARN 12 Job finished a validation run with warnings DSJS.VALFAILED 13 Job failed a validation run DSJS.

item.title: IBM Datastage - inštalácia na linuxe
IBM Datastage - debug mód
item.description: http://www-01.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg21509567 Service management File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/bin/DSAppWatcher.sh Variable: APW_DEBUG Populating DSODB File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/DSODBConfig.cfg Variable: TraceMax=1000 File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/DSODBTuning.cfg Variable: com.ibm.datastage.jlog.DSFileHandler.level=DEBUG

item.title: IBM IS Datastage - inštalácia FixPack-u
item.description: Príprava: http://www-01.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg24044633 Procedúra: http://www.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg22014102 http://www-01.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg27046499&aid=1 \ Create folders: mkdir /data/IS mkdir /data/IS/BACKUP Move installation file to the server: is-update-linux64-11.7.0.106.tar fixpack_FP2_IS115_linux64_11500-11501.ispkg\ Increase size of /tmp FS to have at least 2.5GB of free space --- Procedure --- 1.) connect to the server #verify health and status #create maintenance flag for monitoring 2.) stop Datastage 3.) perform DB2 XMETA database offline backup to folder: /data/IS/BACKUP //DB2 part Note: permission issue, 1.2GB, lasted few seconds

item.title: IBM IS Datastage - zmena hesiel
item.description: Note: this is procedure to update password for OS accounts which are used by Datastage. User "xmeta": KB link: https://www.ibm.com/support/knowledgecenter/en/SSYQ72_10.0.4/com.ibm.help.suiteinstall1004.reportconfig.doc/T_ResettingPasswordForXMetaAndCognos.html 1.) switch to main DS user su - dsadm 2.) move to the folder cd /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/ASBServer/bin 3.) update the password via script ./AppServerAdmin.sh -db -user xmeta -password 4.) verify the password via command ./AppServerAdmin.sh -w User "xmetasr": KB link: http://www-01.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg21640075 1.) switch to main DS user su - dsadm 2.) move to the folder
